mapper.insert: INSERT INTO model_interface ( processmodel_id, interface_name, is_default, created_at, updated_at, interface_summary ) VALUES ( #{processmodelId}, #{interfaceName}, #{isDefault}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{interfaceSummary} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, processmodel_id AS processmodelId, interface_name AS interfaceName, is_default AS isDefault, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, interface_summary AS interfaceSummary FROM model_interface WHERE id = #{id}
